text: Hi, I need a refill for metformin 500 milligrams twice daily and lisinopril 10 milligrams once daily. I only have five pills left and I want to avoid missing doses.
After knee replacement last week, I was told ibuprofen 600 milligrams every 6 hours, but I might have taken it every 16 hours last night, and now the pain is worse.
I started having new headaches and dizziness since increasing amlodipine to 10 milligrams in the morning, and I feel lightheaded when I stand up.
Before you prescribe cephalexin, please note I had lip swelling and hives about 30 minutes after my second dose last year.
On speakerphone with a TV in the background, I am trying to confirm apixaban, maybe 2.5 or maybe 5 milligrams twice daily, and I am worried because I feel chest tightness.
Quick med list: metformin 500 milligrams twice daily, lisinopril 10 daily, atorvastatin 20 nightly, levothyroxine 75 micrograms mornings, warfarin 4 nightly, and insulin glargine 18 units at bedtime.
